reviews.comment:
Impecable la atención en Particular destacar al Playero Julio Cesar "Pato"
Y a los encargados por autorizar que me den una mano con el auto. Un héroe ese día para mí familia .Más para el que no es de la zona y no conoce bien la cuidad excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
The service was impeccable. Special mention goes to the attendant Julio Cesar "Pato," and to the staff for allowing them to help me with my car. He was a hero to my family that day. Even more so for someone who isn't from the area and doesn't know the city well—excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5372606000038803063/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQMUluUFJBEAE

reviews.comment:
El consecionario muy servicial siempre, faltan renovar al estilo del ACA POSADAS, y faltan servicios, gomeria lavadero confitería etc. y mejorar pisos y nivelar donde se carga combustible...

(Translated by Google)
The dealership is always very helpful, but they need to renovate like the ACA Posadas, and they're lacking services like a tire shop, car wash, snack bar, etc. They also need to improve the flooring and level the fuel pump area...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5372606000038803063/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURueXZ6RDZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
El servicio y atención en la playa cálida y
eficaz, el baño para varones impecable! La arquitectura de época bien mantenida en el corazón de Oberá.

(Translated by Google)
The service and attention on the beach was warm and efficient, the men's restroom was spotless! The period architecture is well-maintained in the heart of Oberá.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5372606000038803063/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURIOEstdEhnEAE

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por opinar sobre nuestro servicio, esperamos vuelva pronto a visitarnos. Saludos cordiales. Equipo ACA Obera
